# LuCI JS API Documentation Index
# Source: https://github.com/openwrt/luci (commit: de553f3)
# Live docs: https://openwrt.github.io/luci/jsapi/
# Generated: 2026-03-06 07:47 UTC
#
# LuCI is the OpenWrt web configuration interface.
# This index covers its complete client-side JavaScript API.
#
# Standalone use: each .md file in this folder is self-contained with full
# metadata headers. This llms.txt provides the navigational index.
#
## Files in this directory

- [luci-api-cbi.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-cbi.md): LuCI `cbi` JS API — 25 documented members
- [luci-api-firewall.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-firewall.md): LuCI `firewall` JS API — 5 documented members
- [luci-api-form.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-form.md): LuCI `form` JS API — 2 documented members
- [luci-api-fs.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-fs.md): LuCI `fs` JS API — 2 documented members
- [luci-api-luci.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-luci.md): LuCI `luci` JS API — 131 documented members
- [luci-api-static.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-static.md): LuCI `static` JS API — 3 documented members
- [luci-api-prng.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-prng.md): LuCI `prng` JS API — 7 documented members
- [luci-api-widgets.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-widgets.md): LuCI `widgets` JS API — 3 documented members
- [luci-api-uci.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-uci.md): LuCI `uci` JS API — 1 documented member
- [luci-api-ui.md](/luci-docs/luci-api-ui.md): LuCI `ui` JS API — 1 documented member
